message:
🐛 Fix card cache compliance test — warm TTC and fallback regression (#10984)

* 🐛 Fix card cache compliance test — warm TTC and fallback regression

Three root causes addressed:

1. Warm TTC threshold too tight for CI (873ms > 500ms):
   - Add WARM_TTC_THRESHOLD_MS constant with CI multiplier (500ms local, 1000ms CI)
   - CI shared runners exhibit 2-3× slower React hydration under CPU contention
   - Increase WARM_RETURN_WAIT_MS on CI (3s → 5s) to give async cache hydration
     more headroom after full-page navigation fallback

2. Cache fallback regression — IDB snapshot stale after page navigation:
   - When SQLite worker is the active backend, saveToStorage() now mirrors data
     to IndexedDB alongside the worker write (fire-and-forget)
   - This keeps the IDB in-memory snapshot current so CacheStore constructor
     can hydrate via getFromSnapshot() before the worker re-initialises
   - Without this, cards relying on worker storage showed skeleton flash after
     page.goto fallback because the IDB snapshot had stale/missing data

3. Spread syntax safety in Gadget cards:
   - Replace [...data].slice() with (Array.isArray(data) ? data : []).slice()
   - Prevents 'Spread syntax requires iterable' TypeError when API returns
     non-array data (e.g., error objects from the Gadget MCP bridge)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>

* 🐛 Fix unsafe array usage in Gadget cards — derive hasData from safeData

Address Copilot review: all 4 Gadget cards had `hasData = data.length > 0`
before the Array.isArray guard, and DNSTraceCard had `data.filter()` directly.
If fetchGadgetTrace() returns a non-array (e.g. raw string on JSON parse
failure), this caused runtime throws / silent empty-state suppression.

Fix: introduce `safeData = Array.isArray(data) ? data : []` up front in all
4 cards and derive hasData, slice, and filter from safeData.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
